arts.ttl: 'It's not 40, it's 50!' - Amorim on his age after two months at Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is content with his side's win away at Fulham, as he jokes about aging prematurely after after being at the club for two months.

arts.ttl: Analysis: How 'frustrating' Hojlund blunted Man Utd
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger and Shay Given criticise the performance of Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund in his side's 1-0 Premier League win away at Fulham.

arts.ttl: Man Utd close to signing Lecce left-back Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are close to completing a deal for Lecce and Denmark left-back Patrick Dorgu.

arts.ttl: No.9 madness as Arsenal make shock offer amid Chelsea and Man Utd battle: FT recap

arts.ttl: Key quotes from Ruben Amorim's pre-FCSB press conference
arts.sum: We need to start doing that without Sir Alex, just with small help from him, and that can happen in any club." This club has a person like Sir Alex, in charge of everything for so long.

arts.ttl: Amorim insists Rashford must change to play again for Manchester United
arts.sum: Amorim: ‘We have to set some standards, that’s all’ Manager and player are not on speaking terms Ruben Amorim has said that if Marcus Rashford wants to play for Manchester United again he has to show he “wants it really bad” and change his standards. Amorim last selected the forward for United’s 2-1 win at Viktoria Plzen on 12 December, citing “training reasons”. Two days later Rashford said he wanted a “new challenge” and since then he has been in only one match-day squad, for the 2-0 defeat against Newcastle at Old Trafford on 30 December. arts.ttl: Tyrell Malacia on Celtic transfer 'watchlist' as Man Utd man lined up for Kieran Tierney January alternative
arts.sum: The Dutchman is said to be on a list of targets if the Scottish champions fail to land Tierney from Arsenal this month

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News Today: New Rashford replacement eyed as swap offered
arts.sum: Man Utd Transfer News Today: New Rashford replacement eyed as swap offered Man Utd could look to offer Alejandro Garnacho to Chelsea in a spectacular swap deal for either Christopher Nkunku or a rather surprising name.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford urged to apologise to Ruben Amorim as Man Utd feud rumbles on
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker Louis Saha has told Marcus Rashford he only has himself to blame for his ongoing exile and must sort himself out before it is too late to salvage his career
